name: Require Approval for Sends
description: Requires human approval before any outbound communication (emails, calendar invites, file sharing).

rules.name: Approve Email Sends
rules.description: Require approval before sending any email.

rules.name: Approve Calendar Invites
rules.description: Require approval before creating calendar events that invite others.

rules.name: Approve File Sharing
rules.description: Require approval before sharing or modifying Drive permissions.
